dialogue_text: I'm sorry not to do as you wish, but we must pass over your hill whether you like it or not,
source_excerpt: He was quite short and stout and had a big head, which was flat at the top and supported by a thick neck full of wrinkles. But he had no arms at all, and, seeing this, the Scarecrow did not fear that so helpless a creature could prevent...
